title: Database crashes when querying with several UNION ALLs.
poc:
SELECT 1
 FROM (SELECT a FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 0 FROM foo) AS t;
key_bug_features: Querying with multiple UNION ALL statements causes crashes.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO bar (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
SELECT value FROM bar WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bar WHERE value IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT id FROM bar WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
CREATE TABLE baz (x INT, y FLOAT, z BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO baz (x, y, z) VALUES (1, 1.1, TRUE), (2, 2.2, FALSE), (3, NULL, NULL);
